hc3a0536cg3d33g4919gad86g3fd49d580ebd: Not now. Someone's been messing with my bloody cooking pot.
hdf6fc301g975fg46dagb485g504fd0bfd524: Didn't think the food was that bad.
h3646f1c1g08feg4e8fg813dgde99fc00cda8: You. Saw you fighting those slimy bastards.
hcebde28bg9aadg4759ga1bdg7048d7ae22cc: Best to fill your belly now - while we still can.
h5e96a535g313dg4f5ag9ae0gdd9d98443f80: Look. It ain't much, but it might make all the difference.
he2e6f1d1gfeceg4a40gbb5fgc3967ac69940: The only way we'll make it to Baldur's Gate is to run, and run hard.
h4b9269f5g84ebg4415gb421g7680810c1416: If a gnoll catches your scent, you'll need every bit of strength. Trust me.
h71d23801g2bdbg4797g9137g5135f4ae451f: Suit yourself, but the only way we'll make it to Baldur's Gate is to run, and run hard.
h00dc1b76gff30g4592g921cgdb9cdb12a52a: Food. You want it or not?
h24f2461eg030ag4253g9bd0g8a8576a72eb7: See how you feel when your pack is empty - it'll be this or a handful of weeds.
hb0a60811g3aa6g4311g8575g80d9cf9ac462: We'll need every bit of strength to make it to Baldur's Gate. Trust me.
hf645e330g1797g4953gb502g438124c81fab: No, thank you. The smell is more than enough.
ha1f79a0fg788eg4ecegbd24gd7aafd72a68a: Go ahead. Turn that pretty nose of yours up.
hea919bdeg3fb4g4924g9542g85ce713dc0e0: I never turn down a free meal.
he2d6da7cgb6e2g4af1g8c05ga4da07cba72d: You're an easy one to please, aren't you?
h9afad0bagf0e9g47e9g9fd2ga08b4ff39bb8: Here. Have more. We'll need every bit of strength to make it to Baldur's Gate. Trust me.
hd1e6b09dg5a43g46b6gbfcag95710d857fe8: This is a delicacy of your land? I'll try anything once.
h021ff0c0g00fag45f1gaba9g7a39261d7951: Thank you. What's in this? Oats? Honey?
hc80b9b87gfcb8g4703g8f50g499ce3466616: Ha! You're a far cry from such things. But if I fooled your nose, I must be doing something right.
hafab1f3ag7fe0g4d2fg86ebg557bee408910: Agreed. Hungry warriors make for easy prey.
hafaa5ea8g85bag4671ga6f8g5127f877caa2: You been on hard times too, huh?
habf58ee6g402bg423ega136g717c6a7acdbf: No worse than what you're facing now.
h703d91aagb0b6g4bb1ga9d7gb892cd6fe072: Hm. Look in your eyes says otherwise.
hc3a3d02bg42edg46f1gb2ecg8da5f4ced8f3: That doesn't mean it's behind us though, does it?
he70c8fb2g6053g4500g90d6g1c352edb7220: A bowl of gray goo. Reminds me of home.
h71c0637eg8653g4e44gb568gc84b17b31b2a: You've had your share. Leave some for the rest.
he15d3c38g0a2bg44b2gbc11gaeb86895d932: We'll be leaving soon. Make sure you stock up.
